attributes.marketplace-info:
Please note that a 20% surcharge applies to all Public Holidays and Sunday.
Please ensure to arrive 5 minutes before your appointment

attributes.directions: We are located next to West pack on the way to the quarter.

attributes.description: Diamond Barbers Deluxe offers more than just a haircut—it's a premium grooming experience. With a relaxed atmosphere, great tunes, and complimentary refreshments, we focus on providing exceptional service tailored to your style. From expert advice to the final hot towel finish, every detail is designed to ensure you leave looking sharp and feeling confident.

STAY SHARP WITH DIAMOND BARBERS
It’s not just about the hair – it’s about the experience.
Kick back in our laid-back atmosphere, complete with good vibes, great tunes, and a complimentary coffee or water on arrival. Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen to your preferences, offer expert advice, and ensure you leave feeling fresh with a hot towel finish.

Hello there.
It’s not just about the hair – it’s about the experience.
 
Kick back in our laid-back atmosphere, complete with good vibes, great tunes, and a complimentary coffee or water on arrival.
 
Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen to your preferences, offer expert advice, and ensure you leave feeling fresh with a hot towel finish.

Stay sharp with Diamond Barbers
It’s not just about the hair – it’s about the experience.
 
Kick back in our laid-back atmosphere, complete with good vibes, great tunes, and a complimentary coffee or water on arrival.
 
Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen to your preferences, offer expert advice, and ensure you leave feeling fresh with a hot towel finish.

Diamond Barbers, a leading grooming hub, proudly operates in Darwin, Cairns, and Townsville, offering top-notch haircuts, beard trims, and premium grooming products. Renowned for its relaxed atmosphere and exceptional service, the barbershop guarantees satisfaction and fosters strong community partnerships. With a commitment to eco-friendly practices and authenticity, Diamond Barbers continues to set the standard for excellence and style, driving growth and innovation in the grooming industry.

Book your appointment now !

STAY SHARP WITH DIAMOND BARBERS
It’s not just about the hair – it’s about the experience.
 
Kick back in our laid-back atmosphere, complete with good vibes, great tunes, and a complimentary coffee or water on arrival.
 
Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen to your preferences, offer expert advice, and ensure you leave feeling fresh with a hot towel finish.

At Diamond Barbers, the commitment to a superior grooming experience shines through every detail. The skilled barbers offer a range of services tailored for seniors, kids, and everyone in between, ensuring a perfect look for every client. With a welcoming atmosphere that includes complimentary refreshments and a focus on individual preferences, stepping into this barber shop feels like an indulgent retreat.

STAY SHARP WITH DIAMOND BARBERS

It’s not just about the hair – it’s about the experience.
 
Kick back in our laid-back atmosphere, complete with good vibes, great tunes, and a complimentary coffee or water on arrival.
 
Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen to your preferences, offer expert advice, and ensure you leave feeling fresh with a hot towel finish.

payload:
{"operationName":"getDailyCalendarBookings","query":"query getDailyCalendarBookings($dates: [Date!]!, $locationId: ID!, $resources: [ResourceInput!]!, $withCancelled: Boolean!, $excludeBookingsSpanningFromPreviousDay: Boolean, $limitBookingsPerDay: Int, $groupByResource: Boolean, $visibilityFilters: VisibilityFiltersInput, $allowStaleData: Boolean, $queryContext: QueryContextInput) {
  dailyCalendarBookings(
    dates: $dates
    locationId: $locationId
    resources: $resources
    withCancelled: $withCancelled
    excludeBookingsSpanningFromPreviousDay: $excludeBookingsSpanningFromPreviousDay
    limitBookingsPerDay: $limitBookingsPerDay
    groupByResource: $groupByResource
    visibilityFilters: $visibilityFilters
    allowStaleData: $allowStaleData
    queryContext: $queryContext
  ) {
    date
    count
    resource {
      id
      type
      __typename
    }
    bookings {
      appointmentId
      basePrice
      bookingSequenceId
      bookingServiceAddOns {
        name
        quantity
        __typename
      }
      bookingTimeSegments {
        __typename
        irreducibleDurationInSeconds
        isMainServicingTime
        sortingId
        totalDurationInSeconds
        type
      }
      cardRequired
      createdByEmployeeId
      customerId
      customerName
      date
      depositId
      employeeId
      employeeIsRequested
      endDate
      endTime
      groupId
      groupOwnerId
      groupOwnerName
      id
      isHiddenByVisibilityFilters
      isOnline
      locationId
      notes
      packageInstanceName
      paidPlanInstanceId
      parentId
      price
      priceType
      relatedBookingIds
      roomId
      salePaymentStatus
      serviceGroupColor
      serviceId
      serviceName
      servicePricingLevelId
      servicePricingLevelName
      startDate
      startTime
      status
      statusLabelId
      timeEndInSeconds
      timeStartInSeconds
      salesOrderId
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}","variables":{"allowStaleData":true,"dates":["2026-03-16","2026-03-17","2026-03-18","2026-03-19","2026-03-20","2026-03-21","2026-03-22","2026-03-23","2026-03-24","2026-03-25","2026-03-26","2026-03-27","2026-03-28","2026-03-29","2026-03-30","2026-03-31","2026-04-01","2026-04-02","2026-04-03","2026-04-04","2026-04-05","2026-04-06","2026-04-07","2026-04-08","2026-04-09","2026-04-10","2026-04-11","2026-04-12","2026-04-13","2026-04-14","2026-04-15","2026-04-16","2026-04-17","2026-04-18","2026-04-19"],"groupByResource":true,"locationId":"1460956","queryContext":{"fetchType":"BACKGROUND"},"resources":[{"id":"3328952","type":"EMPLOYEES"},{"id":"3328945","type":"EMPLOYEES"},{"id":"3328939","type":"EMPLOYEES"}],"visibilityFilters":{},"withCancelled":false}}

{"operationName":"getDailyCalendarBookings","query":"query getDailyCalendarBookings($dates: [Date!]!, $locationId: ID!, $resources: [ResourceInput!]!, $withCancelled: Boolean!, $excludeBookingsSpanningFromPreviousDay: Boolean, $limitBookingsPerDay: Int, $groupByResource: Boolean, $visibilityFilters: VisibilityFiltersInput, $allowStaleData: Boolean, $queryContext: QueryContextInput) {
  dailyCalendarBookings(
    dates: $dates
    locationId: $locationId
    resources: $resources
    withCancelled: $withCancelled
    excludeBookingsSpanningFromPreviousDay: $excludeBookingsSpanningFromPreviousDay
    limitBookingsPerDay: $limitBookingsPerDay
    groupByResource: $groupByResource
    visibilityFilters: $visibilityFilters
    allowStaleData: $allowStaleData
    queryContext: $queryContext
  ) {

      isHiddenByVisibilityFilters
      isOnline

  }
}","variables":{"dates":["2026-03-31"],"groupByResource":false,"locationId":"1460956","queryContext":{"fetchType":"FOREGROUND"},"resources":[],"visibilityFilters":{},"withCancelled":false}}
